core_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix Enterprise SaaS with Futuristic AI aesthetics.
Density with Breathability: High information density for dashboards, but with generous padding inside containers.
Contrast is King: Use high contrast for data readability. No washed-out grays for text.
Motion with Meaning: Micro-interactions for every state change. No static UI.
AI as a First-Class Citizen: AI features should visually stand out (gradients, glows) from standard CRUD operations.
anti_patterns: No 'Inter' for Headings. Use 'Plus Jakarta Sans'.
No generic full-screen gradients. Use subtle mesh or noise textures.
No center-aligned layouts for data. Left-align for readability.
No default 'blue' links. Use brand indigo.
No 'toy' AI emojis. Use abstract tech icons.

typography.instructions: Import 'Plus Jakarta Sans' from Google Fonts. Apply 'font-heading' utility class to all headings.

usage_rules: Use 'bg-background' (Slate-50/Slate-900) for the main app background.
Use Primary Indigo (#6366F1) for primary actions and active states.
Use AI Gradient for AI-generated content borders or accents.

layout_strategy.spacing_scale: Generous. Use p-6 or p-8 for card padding. Gap-6 for grids.

cards.style: bg-card border border-border/50 shadow-sm rounded-xl overflow-hidden hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-300
cards.usage: Wrap all dashboard widgets in Cards.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 shadow-sm h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-md font-medium transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary/10 text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/20 h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-md font-medium transition-colors
buttons.outline: border border-input bg-background hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-md transition-colors
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-md transition-colors

inputs.style: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

charts.style: Minimalist. Remove grid lines if possible. Use custom tooltips with glassmorphism.

visual_enhancements.glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 dark:bg-black/60 border border-white/20 dark:border-white/10 shadow-lg

gradients.subtle_mesh: radial-gradient(at 0% 0%, hsla(253,16%,7%,1) 0, transparent 50%), radial-gradient(at 50% 0%, hsla(225,39%,30%,1) 0, transparent 50%), radial-gradient(at 100% 0%, hsla(339,49%,30%,1) 0, transparent 50%)

instructions_to_main_agent.general: You are building the 'AI BOS' - a high-end enterprise OS. Do not make it look like a basic CRUD app. Use the spacing, typography, and color rules strictly.
instructions_to_main_agent.layout_setup: Implement a 'DashboardLayout' component with a collapsible sidebar and a top header. Use 'Outlet' for page content.
instructions_to_main_agent.theme_setup: Ensure 'ThemeProvider' wraps the app to support light/dark toggling. Default to System preference.
instructions_to_main_agent.ai_integration: When building the 'AI Chat Interface', use the 'ai_neural_node' image as a subtle background or header graphic. Use 'ai_glow' shadow on the chat input.
instructions_to_main_agent.dashboard_widgets: Create reusable 'StatsCard', 'ChartCard', and 'ListCard' components. Use the 'retail_interior' or 'warehouse_interior' images as covers for Branch/Inventory cards.

universal_guidelines: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. In frontend design, this creates what users call the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯 for icons. Use Lucide icons instead.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
Use 'sonner' for toasts. Component located in /app/frontend/src/components/ui/sonner.jsx
